text.p: How are you and 1 character how are you coping with the cold weather over there in the States . I know its been long we've not heard from one another but not to worry much. all is fine. My reasons of writing this letter to you is to know how you are doing over there and to intimate or inform you about the last populat-ion and housing Census which took place here in nigeria. , I want you to know that it was a different thing all together, quite different from the previous ones. the reason is because , the just concluded census does not only care to know about the number of people alone, but it cared to know about the number of houses, the number of people living in each room, in short it inquired abat about the standard of living of the people. The nation and the citizens stands to gain alot from the just concluded Census.

The first benefit I want to talk about is this. The just concluded census will help the government in times of future planing. Since the government knows the number of people and their standard of living, it will help the government to know the type of economic programes to emback on in order to improve the people's standard of living.

Secondly, The just concluded population and housing Census will help the government in the efficient and equitable distribution of fiscal allocations and other national benefits. The census will help the government to know the areas that are much populated and those which are less populated so that in times of distributing or allocating resources and other things no part will be cheated.

finally, The last population and housing Census will make the government have accurate information on the entire economic, social and educat-ional level of the country. the Census will provide the government will the number of unemployed graduates, the number of undergraduates, the estimate or possible growth of the population in the few coming years and other important informations that will be useful to the government is planing for their economic strategies. So , you see the benefit the country stands to get out of the just concluded Census. please make sure you return hom during the summer holiday because we really missed you.
